messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] New Stochastic Processes textbook Using R
messages.subject_clean: New Stochastic Processes textbook Using R
messages.body_plain:
Dear friends,

A new undergraduate-focused textbook on stochastic processes: Introduction to Stochastic Processes With R (Wiley 2016)
is now available.

A focus of the book is simulation. The book includes an R tutorial and example script files.

Here is the link to the book's homepage: http://people.carleton.edu/~rdobrow/stochbook/

and to the Wiley page

http://www.wiley.com/WileyCDA/WileyTitle/productCd-1118740653.html


If you would like more information, sample chapters, or have any questions, I would be happy to discuss.

Best,
Bob Dobrow
Department of Mathematics and Statistics
Carleton College
Northfield, MN 55057
rdobrow at carleton.edu
